title: IDC Portfolio Performance and Dividend Remittance
description: IDC must ensure all profitable portfolio companies declare and remit dividends of at least 30% of net profit to the Consolidated Fund. IDC must submit consolidated portfolio performance report to Ministry of Finance by 31 March annually.

title: Performance Contract Framework for SOEs
description: All IDC portfolio companies must sign annual performance contracts with IDC and the relevant line ministry by 31 March each year.

title: Zambia SOE Rationalisation and Privatisation Review
description: IDC must conduct a strategic review of all portfolio companies and identify candidates for privatisation, merger, or liquidation. Report to be submitted to Cabinet by 30 June 2024.

issuingAuthority: Ministry of Mines and Minerals Development
title: Local Content Requirements for Mining Procurement
description: Mining companies must achieve minimum 30% local content in procurement by December 2025.

title: ZESCO Turnaround Plan Implementation
description: IDC and Ministry of Finance jointly direct ZESCO to implement a credible turnaround plan including tariff increases, cost reduction, and debt restructuring within 12 months.
